mapper.select: SELECT user_id, username, email, nickname, role, email_verified_at, created_at, deleted_at, account_status FROM users

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users
account_status = #{accountStatus}
AND nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users(username, email, email_verified_at, password, nickname, profile_image_url) VALUES(#{username}, #{email}, #{emailVerifiedAt}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{profileImageUrl})
mapper.update:
UPDATE users
nickname = #{nickname},
password = #{password},
bio = #{bio},
profile_image_url = #{profileImageUrl},
WHERE username = #{username}
UPDATE users SET account_status = 'DELETED', deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE username = #{username} AND account_status != 'DELETED'
UPDATE users SET account_status = 'SUSPENDED' WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND account_status = 'ACTIVE' AND role != 'ADMIN'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_suspensions(user_id, reason, suspended_until, suspended_by) VALUES(#{userId}, #{reason}, #{suspendedUntil}, #{suspendedBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET account_status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND account_status = 'SUSPENDED'
UPDATE user_suspensions SET released_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, release_reason = '정지 기간 만료' WHERE released_at IS NULL AND suspended_until <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
UPDATE users u SET u.account_status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE u.account_status = 'SUSPENDED' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_suspensions us WHERE us.active_user_id = u.user_id )
